title: Solutions When PayPal and Stripe Ban Your Account: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you know the frustration of being banned by PayPal and Stripe, limiting your ability to sell your products globally. This restriction affects not only you but also countless other creators in countries like Kenya, Bangladesh, and Venezuela, who are unable to access conventional payment platforms due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. It's time to explore alternative solutions that can help you reach a global audience without the need for traditional payment processors.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for digital creators, but they come with significant restrictions for creators in certain countries. These platforms often require KYC verification, have strict policies, and may not support local currencies. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine offers a more inclusive and flexible solution, allowing creators to sell their products without the need for traditional payment processors or KYC verification.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict policies when it comes to restricted countries, often banning creators from these regions altogether. Gumroad and Payhip also have limitations, making it difficult for creators to access their platforms. However, crypto-native infrastructure is designed to be more accessible, providing a global solution that bypasses traditional payment restrictions and allows creators to sell their products to anyone, anywhere in the world.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

The crypto payment alternative is not a workaround — it is a structurally different approach to commerce. NOWPayments operates as a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT on multiple chains, Solana, and Tron. Transactions settle directly to a wallet you control. There is no platform holding period, no payout schedule, and no compliance department deciding whether your country is permitted to receive funds. The Core Shop Engine integrates with NOWPayments via webhook, which means every confirmed transaction automatically triggers delivery — no manual steps, no delays, no dependency on a platform that can suspend your access.
Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses traditional payment restrictions.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automated delivery and payment verification are crucial for digital creators, but traditional platforms often fall short. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine offers automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easier for creators to manage their sales and focus on their products. With the added benefit of Web3 Wallet Connect, creators can integrate multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds into their storefronts, streamlining the payment process for their customers.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, crypto-native infrastructure is likely your best bet. With its global accessibility, low fees, and automated delivery capabilities, it offers a more flexible and inclusive solution than traditional payment platforms. By choosing a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, you can reach a global audience, increase your earnings, and focus on creating the products you love.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine offers automated delivery and payment verification.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

For digital creators in restricted countries, finding a reliable payment solution is crucial. That's why many are turning to crypto-native infrastructure, like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, which offers frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds for just $19.99. You can explore more solutions like this at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and start selling your digital products to a global audience.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products globally, first, choose a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine. Next, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your storefront to accept payments in over 300 cryptocurrencies. Then, set up automated delivery and payment verification to streamline your sales process. By following these steps, you can bypass traditional payment restrictions and reach a global audience.
